name: Aladdin B2B
description: Developer of a business-to-business matchmaking and meetings platform designed to facilitate global trade through technology. The company's platform identifies the right suppliers or buyers to meet and close deals that focus on sourcing products and services from the world to the MENA region, enabling business clients to save money and time by going directly to business and trade without the long channel of intermediaries and brokers.

name: FineDine
description: Developer of a digital menu platform designed to help restaurants, cafés, bars and hotels increase sales and lower operational costs. The company's platform offers an error-free ordering process, promotes items, tracks customer behavior and collects feedbacks, enabling restaurants to minimize customer waiting time and employee costs.

name: Shekar
description: Operator of an entertainment and media platform intended to create and share viral Korean pop culture content in English. The company's platform creates shareable content with Korean music, dramas, movies, celebrities, fashion, culture, and more, enabling fans to follow their favorite music and entertainment from the performers.

name: Lexyom
description: Developer of an online legal platform designed to offer experienced, international, and price-predictable legal services to clients. The company's platform leverages artificial intelligence technology to offer draft legal documents and offers advisory services in the areas of contracts, tax, trademarks, and investment rounds, enabling clients to have access to a secure and confidential way to get legal advice at an affordable cost.

name: Shezlong
description: Operator of an online health service intended for psychotherapy treatment. The company assists in searching for licensed therapists, reserving dates, and talking to them without disclosing their identity and keeping their details private, enabling patients to identify their psychological problems and get treatment.

name: Solana
description: Developer of a decentralized blockchain platform designed to deliver a scalable blockchain network. The company's platform unlocks concurrent graphics processing unit parallelization, using proof of history, delivering high speed, low latency, and inexpensive transactions, all at layer without sharding, enabling users to scale over transactions on stock hardware.

name: Verbal
description: Developer virtual care Artificial intelligence (AI) platform designed to help healthcare payers and providers to automate admin work, streamline quality assurance and level up care team performance. The company's platform analyzes audio from live calls and draws on organizational protocols to automate key administrative tasks and give care healthcare professionals real-time guidance on how best to respond and shortens the time to onboarding proficiency by providing real-time coaching during customer interactions, enabling medical professionals to focus on handling care management and drug safety.

name: StructionSite
description: Developer of a construction site management platform designed to simplify the process of inspection, monitoring and quality control analysis of construction projects. The company's platform automatically tag photos with date, time, and user information for filtering and fast search-ability, gives photos location and direction intelligence and facilitates push photos along with tagged information, enabling project teams to communicate in the context of the jobsite anytime, from anywhere.

name: Hawaya
description: Developer of a dating application designed to match users with their partner on scientific grounds. The company's application provides a questionnaire designed by local experts in marriage therapy and the results is then processed by matching algorithm, that provides the users everyday with only 1 quality match and also works on an AI program that studies how much two people talk to each other and their linguistics and then analyses the result, enabling Egyptians to find and communicate with a better match than the average conventional methods in a pressure free, engaging environment.
